package rulefixtures

import (
	"bytes"
)

// scenario for bytes_replace_neg_one_replaceall: `bytes.Replace(..., -1)` instead of `bytes.ReplaceAll(...)`.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario457Positive(haystack []byte, needle []byte, left []byte, right []byte) bool {
	return bytes.Index(haystack, needle) != -1
}
